title: drimia maritima var. hesperia
intro: Drimia maritima var. hesperia, also known as the coastal squill or sea squill, is a variant of the Drimia maritima plant, a perennial succulent native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Drimia maritima var. hesperia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of an infusion or tincture, and its roots and leaves are typically used to make these preparations.
